theme_strategy.name: Academic Clarity
theme_strategy.description: A fusion of Swiss International Style (clarity, grids) and Organic Warmth (human-centric, approachable). Avoids the sterile 'Enterprise SaaS' look by using warm neutrals and deep academic tones.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2E5C5A] text-white hover:bg-[#244A48] shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 shadow-sm
buttons.destructive: bg-white border border-rose-200 text-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-50 hover:border-rose-300

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:border-[#2E5C5A]/50 transition-colors duration-300 cursor-pointer

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

login_hero.usage: Split screen hero image for login/register pages. Apply a subtle dark overlay (bg-black/20) to ensure text readability if overlaid.

empty_state_study.usage: Use for empty states in 'My Registrations' or 'Study Moments' when no data is present.

classroom_context.usage: Use for teacher-specific dashboard sections or promotional blocks.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Use 'text-slate-900' on white, 'text-white' on primary background.
accessibility.interactive_elements: All buttons and links must have a focus ring (ring-2 ring-offset-2).
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion'. Use CSS variables for animation durations that can be set to 0.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids and diagonals.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖, 🧠, etc.) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures and noise overlays separate good from extraordinary.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the Theme: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the 'colors' and 'border_radius' defined above.
2. Global Styles: Update 'index.css' to include the base font families (Outfit for headings, Inter for body). Import fonts from Google Fonts via simple CSS import or link tag in index.html.
3. Layout Implementation: Build the 'DashboardLayout' component using the 'Sidebar' pattern. Use the 'Academic Slate' color for the sidebar background.
4. Component Customization: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Warm Paper' and 'Academic Slate' aesthetic. Remove default 'zinc' feel.
5. Page Construction: Build pages following the 'Bento' grid layout for dashboards. Use the provided image URLs for login/empty states.
6. Testing Preparation: Add 'data-testid' to every button, input, and card.
